name: std-agent-pipeline
description: Agent pipeline: multi-step planned execution with session tree and progress logs.

schema.name: std-agent-pipeline
schema.description: Agent pipeline: multi-step planned execution with session tree and progress logs.

fields.name: task
fields.description: A brief description of the task being performed.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Classification or type of the pipeline plan.

fields.name: steps
fields.description: Ordered sequence of actions within a process.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: A numerical value representing certainty or likelihood.

fields.name: status
fields.description: The current state of the process.

fields.name: relevantMemories
fields.description: Identifies memories pertinent to the current operation.
fields.synonyms: memory identifiers, related memories, memory references

fields.name: memoryCount
fields.description: The number of memory items associated with this plan.

fields.name: error
fields.description: Textual description of an error or failure condition.

fields.name: input
fields.description: The data provided as initial information for processing.
fields.synonyms: initial data, source, starting point, query

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: The text provided as input to the component.

fields.name: response
fields.description: The text-based output generated by a process.

fields.name: provider
fields.description: Identifies the source or origin of the data.

fields.name: model
fields.description: The identifier of the language model used.

fields.name: content
fields.description: The textual data associated with a specific item.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: The area or domain this plan applies to.

fields.name: strength
fields.description: Numerical value representing a degree of certainty or intensity.

fields.name: pinned
fields.description: Indicates whether the item is marked for persistent visibility.

fields.name: action
fields.description: The specific action to be performed.

fields.name: detail
fields.description: A more specific explanation or elaboration of a status.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Date and time of an event or record.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: The length of time the process took, in a numerical format.

fields.name: icon
fields.description: Visual representation; typically a filename or URL.

effects: Classify this task into exactly one category.
Generate a numbered step-by-step execution plan.
Include a confidence score (0-100) for how likely this plan will succeed.

fields.name: task
fields.description: A brief description of the task being performed.

fields.name: plan
fields.description: The overall strategy or blueprint for the execution.

fields.name: iterations
fields.description: The number of times a process repeats.

fields.name: maxIterations
fields.description: The maximum number of times the process can repeat.

fields.name: status
fields.description: The current state of the process.

fields.name: result
fields.description: The outcome or output of a process or operation.

fields.name: currentTool
fields.description: The name of the tool currently being utilized.

fields.name: lastToolResult
fields.description: The output or result from the last tool execution.

fields.name: error
fields.description: Details about any errors encountered during execution.

fields.name: currentStep
fields.description: The index of the currently executing step.
fields.synonyms: step number, step index, current iteration

fields.name: totalSteps
fields.description: The total number of steps defined in the plan.

fields.name: steps
fields.description: Ordered sequence of actions within a process.

fields.name: toolName
fields.description: The name of the tool used in this step.

fields.name: args
fields.description: Arguments passed to the pipeline execution.

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: The text used as input for a task or process.

fields.name: response
fields.description: The text output generated by a processing step.

fields.name: provider
fields.description: Identifies the source or origin of the data.

fields.name: model
fields.description: The identifier of the language model used.

fields.name: tokenCount
fields.description: The number of tokens used.

fields.name: maxTokens
fields.description: The maximum number of tokens allowed for processing.
fields.synonyms: token limit, max length, token count

fields.name: usage
fields.description: Represents the number of times the component has been utilized.

fields.name: current
fields.description: The current position or value within a sequence or range.

fields.name: max
fields.description: The maximum value or limit for a numerical property.

fields.name: threshold
fields.description: Minimum value required for a condition to be met.

fields.name: lastCompactedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last compaction event.

fields.name: action
fields.description: The specific operation to be performed.

fields.name: detail
fields.description: A more specific explanation or elaboration of the main content.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Date and time of an event or record creation.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: The length of time the process took, in a numerical format.

children.content: Describe the task to execute with tools

effects: Generate a step-by-step plan. Return the first tool to call and its arguments.
Is the task complete? If yes, provide the final result. If no, specify the next tool and arguments.
